metadata.title: Calm Side Peek Turns a 2v1 Into a Quick Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a smart side peek with steady aim that flips the fight. Timing and positioning make all the difference here.
What's your favorite angle to catch enemies off guard?
Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
